details.reasoning: Excellent implementation that successfully creates a new PixelArt AI provider package following AI SDK v3 patterns. All core requirements met: package.json properly configured, createPixelArt factory function exported, PixelArtProvider interface correctly extends ProviderV3 with image() and imageModel() methods, image model implementation with proper doGenerate method (correct for v3 spec), image settings supporting size/style/pixelDensity with all required styles ('pixel', 'retro', '8bit'), base URL correctly set to 'https://api.pixelart.ai/v1', package structure matches existing providers with TypeScript/vitest setup, and no existing files modified except root tsconfig.json (expected). Comprehensive tests verify all functionality. Minor note: rubric references 'generateImage method' but AI SDK v3 pattern uses 'doGenerate' which the agent correctly implemented—this is a rubric terminology issue, not an implementation flaw.
